scripts.ci:all: npm -w packages/mobile-app run ci:check && npm -w packages/api run lint:check && npm -w packages/api run build
scripts.test:all: npm -w packages/mobile-app test && npm -w packages/api test
scripts.lint:all: npm -w packages/mobile-app run lint && npm -w packages/api run lint:check
scripts.typecheck:all: npm -w packages/mobile-app run typecheck && npm -w packages/api run build
